description: Unit test specifications for the TemplateFactory module, testing its HTML generation, sanitization, content handling, and class resolution features.

methods.name: describe
methods.description: Defines a test suite or a nested test suite for organizing related tests.

methods.name: it
methods.description: Defines an individual test case with a description and test logic.

methods.name: beforeAll
methods.description: Setup function executed once before all tests in the suite.

methods.name: afterEach
methods.description: Cleanup function executed after each test case.
